page_metadata.biotools__summary: Canary is a bioinformatics tool that allows for the automatic conversion of MaCH dosage files (mlinfo and mldose) into PLINK1 and PLINK2 compatible files.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Canary is a bioinformatics tool that allows for the automatic conversion of MaCH dosage files (mlinfo and mldose) into PLINK1 and PLINK2 compatible files.
